name: Bug report
about: Create a bug report for one of the Nexa repos or examples.
labels: bug
---

# Bug report

<!-- 

⚠️ We receive a lot of bug reports which have already been solved or discussed. If you are looking for help, please try these first:

- Docs: https://docs.supabase.com
- Discussions: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/discussions
- Discord: https://discord.supabase.com

Before opening a bug report, please verify the following: 

-->

- [ ] I confirm this is a bug with Nexa, not with my own application. 
- [ ] I confirm I have searched the [Docs](https://docs.nexa-lang.com) and GitHub [Discussions](https://github.com/Nexa-Language/Nexa/discussions). 

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior, please provide code snippets or a repository:

1. Go to '…'
2. Click on '…'(or Compile...)
3. Scroll down to '…'(or do...)
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## System information

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
- Browser (if applies) [e.g. chrome, safari]
- Version of supabase-js: [e.g. 6.0.2]
- Version of Node.js: [e.g. 10.10.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
